sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84148" key="podi/krotos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποδίκροτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84148.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clanking on the feet,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἅμμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>*.</sense> </entryFree>
